rationale: React key warnings resolved (0 remaining). Frontend regression green across lint, typescript, tests (158/158), coverage (thresholds met), and build. Backend regression limited to syntax check (111 files) - API/integration/smoke/coverage blocked due to PostgreSQL unavailability. E2E 1/3 pass, 2/3 fail due to missing backend. All failures are infrastructure-related, not code defects. No functional regressions detected.
next_phase_prerequisites: Install PostgreSQL 16+ with database and credentials matching env config
Run seeds 1-5 to populate reference data
Start backend with APP_ENV=qa and PERSISTENCE_MODE=postgres
Run full backend regression (unit, API, integration, smoke, coverage)
Run full E2E suite with all 10 flows against real QA stack
Execute WebForge Python suite (python -m pytest; webforge normalize/plan/tools validate)
